programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Arnold the spoiled kid moves to town, he thinks he can walk all over the townsfolk, including Andy and Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A young man is accused of being the mysterious crook who's been robbing Wally's filling station. Andy and Barney try to determine his guilt or innocence in a variety of methods.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale is trying to get his money back, while Jed is trying to prevent him from doing so. And Jethro is trying to come up with a way to beat the smog problem. Drysdale sends Jane over to get the money, posing as a guard. When Jed doesn't give it to him, Drysdale tells him what he's got is a drop in the bucket, and only the President could really do anything. Jed returns the money and says he plans to give all his money to the President.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph is busy buying Alice a vacuum while Norton is the deciding vote in the Raccoon election for convention manager.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink fails a physical and gets combat duty at the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to detour the German bombers that normally attack London to a nearby Allied airbase.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Captain's Coins
programme.desc: Historian Phillip Andrews argues that his fiancée, Evelyn Faraday, is entitled to a share of a shipping company fortune. Phillip then finds himself accused of murdering the company's top man.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: More than $200,000 worth of imperial jade is reported stolen. Friday and Gannon determine the burglary was an inside job.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An old and eccentric woman is targeted by a crooked couple who think she has a lot of money stashed away.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Arthur comes back from the afterlife to find out the identity of his murderer.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Thanks to an old gal-pal, Mannix gets trapped in the middle of a feud between rival smugglers.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Stolen precious artifacts from a church in Mexico, has Cannon in search of three suspects.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A journalist's investigation of a land scandal ends in murder and blackmail.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe returns to Hooterville with his son, Homer Jr., who is a carbon copy of his dad.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A former resident returns to Hooterville and seems to be a self-made woman. Mary Jane is a business executive who can handle any situation and seems to have a way with men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Even though the Clampetts are enjoying Maria’s cooking, Granny is upset that there is another cook in her kitchen. She wants Maria to leave, and Jed knows Maria leaving is the best thing to make everything right. However, Jethro is in love with Maria, hoping to marry her. Jane figures out a way to get Maria in good with Granny. She arranges a meeting between the two cooks, and Jane tells Maria to answer "Yes" to everything.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide Jethro needs a job. They send him down to the bank to try to get work. While he is there, he runs into a magician, Marvo the Magnificent. After Marvo learns of his uncle’s many, many millions, he agrees to go home with Jethro. Marvo puts on a show for the Clampetts, and afterwards Jethro decides to become a magician.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Protek The Weakerist, Peep In The Deep, A Dream Walking
programme.desc: "Olive asks Popeye to walk her dog, but he's embarrassed by Flyppy., When Popeye searches for treasure, Bluto tries to beat him to it., Popeye and Bluto are awaken from their sleep by the sound of Olive Oyl sleepwalking."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Calypso Cat, The Mad Maestro, Cat And The Mermouse
programme.desc: "Tom falls for a female cat but she quickly loses interest in him when they arrive at an island and Jerry torments him., A maestro conducts an orchestra of various animals but some of them aren’t very good at following his directions., Tom drowns in a lake, and goes to the bottom. There, he finds a mermouse, and then tries to capture it and eat it. The mermouse doesn't give in so easily, though."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Woody's Magic Touch, Pigeon Holed, Salmon Yeggs, Wet Blanket Policy, Scrappy Birthday, Adventures Of Tom Thumb Jr., Ace In The Hole
programme.desc: "Woody must trick a witch in order to transform the king's son back into a human again., Homer Pigeon goes to the doctor for glasses, only to realize his poor vision has led him to the induction center for the Pigeonaire Corps instead., Windy tries to show his son Breezy how to steal from a salmon cannery, but gets sealed in a can himself., Buzz Buzzard tries to collect on Woody Woodpecker's life insurance policy by any means necessary!, Andy buys a hound to catch a fox and make a fox fur coat for his girlfriend's birthday present., Tom Thumb discovers a new island, but he's taken by a giant who always wanted a son., Woody Woodpecker is a stable boy who longs to fly a plane. But the bulldog sergeant on the airfield stands in his way."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Half-fare Hare, Fox Terror, A Peck O' Trouble, Roman Legion-hare, Odor-able Kitty, Fast Buck Duck, Wet Hare
programme.desc: "Bugs is chased on a train by two bums that want him for food. , A sneaky fox tries to use the arguments between Foghorn and the Dog to get into the chicken coop. He tries to trick Foghorn with a variety of salesman ploys to steer both the chicken and dog away from the coop. , Dodsworth, a lazy cat, tries to teach a kitten how to catch a woodpecker so that he can have breakfast without doing any physical work. , Yosemite Sam selects Bugs Bunny to be a victim for the Roman Colosseum. , A tomcat dresses up like a skunk because he thinks it will be easier to get food that way. What he actually does is attract the attention of Pepe LePew who chases him all over the land., Desperate and down in the gutter, Daffy hears of a millionaire offering a great job position. He only needs to get in to the house to get the interview, but the bulldog just won't let him in., Bugs Bunny is taking a shower under a waterfall when suddenly the water stops. He goes up to see what the problem is and meets a lumberjack who wants all the water for himself. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Headless Woman
programme.desc: On a dusty Californian trail, Jim and Artemus intercept a stagecoach whose driver has been hired to smuggle boll weevils. Quickly theorizing that someone is trying to destroy the country's cotton crop, they set out to find the mastermind of the operation and destroy his distribution system before his plan succeeds.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Wanting a safe escort through indian country, a stranger rides upon the wagon train. After telling the major his reasons for being there, the truth is soon uncovered and it causes two men to change their lifelong habits.

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Jarrod defends a basque sheepherder—a self-described anarchist—who is accused of murdering a cattleman. He finds that not all of the basque community wants his client to be acquitted.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Deesha accuses Emmett Bowers of stealing his horses. Bowers tells Matt he bought them. Slim and Jake Wirth have the same trouble. Matt must find the horse thief before a lynch mob forms."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Johnny Red asks the Marshall where the Crale ranch is. Says he's Mrs Crale's long lost son Billy. Matt doesn't think so because the War Dept said that Billy was killed at the Battle of Shilo."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Rosalita hopes to win the Cartwrights as patrons of her opera career. There's just one problem with her plan: she lacks the skill to make a career of opera!

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau is gunning for Lucas, who killed his father during an attempted robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Japanese nobleman seeks revenge when his servant is insulted.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Partners of Thad Clemens are holding Favor's herd until they're paid the $15,000 that Thad swindled them out of. Baxter Springs Cattleman's Association will not help Favor.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: A man who left Paladin to die in his place writes to Paladin and asks for his help.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud gets him drafted to go reconcile the hate-fueled hillbillies.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Higher Than A Kite, Idle Roomers, Shivering Sherlocks, Who Done It, Three Little Twirps, Some More Of Samoa
programme.desc: "The Stooges are auto mechanics working for the R.A.F. in England. After wrecking an officers car they need a place to hide, but their choice, a sewer pipe, turns out to a bomb, which is dropped on the enemy. Finding themselves behind enemy lines, Moe and Curly disguise as German officers and Larry dresses as a seductive fraulein. While general Bommel chases after Larry, Moe and Curly steal the secret plans from the high command. , The Stooges are working as bellboys in a large hotel when a side show promoter shows up with 'Lupe', a wild wolfman who promptly escapes. The Stooges try to capture the wolfman by playing music to calm him, but music makes the wolfman go berserk and soon the Stooges are the ones trying to run away. The boys end up caught in an elevator with the wolfman who shoots them into the sky. , The Stooges are tree surgeons who are enlisted by a rich old man to find a mate for his rare puckerless persimmon tree. The boys sail to the tropical island of Rhum-Boogie to find the tree. When they arrive they are captured by the natives and will be eaten unless Curly marries the Chief's ugly daughter. The Stooges escape with the tree and, after a confrontation with an alligator; sail off with their prize. , The Stooges witness an armed robbery and are brought in by the cops as suspects. After passing a lie detector test, the boys are freed but are now the only ones who can identify the crooks. Meanwhile, their friend Gladys has inherited a house in the country and the boys go with her to inspect it so she won't be gypped when it's sold. The house turns out to be the crook's hideout, and when they abduct Gladys, the Stooges must rescue her. , The Stooges are private detectives looking for a missing millionaire. They wander around the millionaire's spooky mansion confronting various crooks and a dangerous dame. The Stooges vanquish the crooks (Shemp uses his "trusty shovel") and find the missing man. , The Stooges get a job putting up posters for a circus but discover that instead of money, their pay is tickets to the show. When trying to scalp their tickets gets them in trouble, they hide out backstage where Curly has an encounter with a bearded lady and Moe and Larry hide in a horse suit. When they're caught, the circus manager gives them a choice of going to jail or joining the circus. What they don't know is that they are to be targets for the Zulu spear thrower. When Curly hits the spear thrower with one of his own spears, the boys are on the run once again. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A crazed axe murderer, released after spending 20 years in a mental institution for lopping the heads off her husband and his lover, returns home to her daughter, who witnessed the slayings as a three-year-old. Shortly after her return, heads begin to roll again, with all the evidence pointing to the woman, who begins to think she's gone insane."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: After the Joker escapes from prison, Batman and Robin search for him, certain he'll attack. However, Batman's secret identity is in jeopardy when the Joker finally surfaces.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise is in danger when Janice Lester, one of Kirk's former lovers, steals his body.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: A grandmother seeks revenge for her grandson's death by turning him into a zombie to do her bidding.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: The Jupiter 2 lands on a planet which serves as a junkyard. The Robinson's food supply is dwindling, so Dr. Smith tries to sell the robot and the ship in order to get food.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: A Saturn space probe re-enters the Earth with a strange creature attached to its surface.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: Kobick captures Chipper and uses the dog as bait to lure in the Earthlings one by one.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.sub-title: The Day The Sky Fell In
programme.desc: At Pearl Harbor on December 6, 1941, Tony and Doug find Tony's father, reported missing after the attack.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent discovers a crystal with alien connections.

programme.title: The Powers of Matthew Star
programme.desc: "Matt temporarily loses his powers to something unknown."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack falls for a new student, only to discover that she's actually the new school nurse! Meanwhile, Slater is afraid of getting his flu shots.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: The return of Bayside's radio station is a smash...except for Slater's boring sports broadcast. When he finds out no one likes it, he quits.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack sets up a 900-number hotline in his latest moneymaking scheme, with Lisa offering advice to the students of Bayside. Things go awry, however, when Zack takes over and offers terrible advice.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Jealous of Slater's skills in Driver's Education, Zack sabotages his driving test.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Jessie is excited to meet her new stepmother at her father's wedding, until she learns he is marrying a much younger woman.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Zack tries to stop Jessie from postponing her dad's wedding. Meanwhile, Slater discovers that his new girlfriend is in fact royalty.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: In the series opener, Mike Brady, a widower with three boys, marries Carol Martin, a widow with three girls. There are a few chaotic events at the wedding, and things get off to a rough start for everyone, but somehow, this group forms a family.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia and Jan mistakenly overhear Sam and Alice discussing elopement and jump to the conclusion that Sam and Alice are secretly planning to marry. The family begins planning a wedding reception, until Alice sets them straight.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: It's their 23rd anniversary, and Howard and Marion are angry at each other over a rate-your-mate test they took in a magazine. They are to go on a second honeymoon, but Marion angers Howard even further when she wants everything to be exactly the same as it was on their first.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley marries Walter Meeney at a VA hospital. The bride is dressed in white, and so is the groom—white bandages from head to toe!

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney believes that Andy should be getting married.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy thinks she and Ricky aren't legally married because his name was misspelled on their marriage license. So she wants them to renew their vows at the same place in Connecticut where Ricky first proposed to her. However, they run out of gas getting there.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: The social event of the season, according to Fred Rutherford, is a big party that a wealthy family is throwing and he rubs it in due to the fact that June and Ward didn't get an invitation. However, Wally and Eddie will be there after they get jobs parking the guest's cars. However, trouble ensues when Eddie parks Fred's car in a no parking spot and the car gets towed away by the city.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June has had it with Wally and Beaver's fighting and demands they make a pact to be nice to one another and do things together. However, when each boy gets an invitation for individual social outings, they each attempt to break the pact.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Matthew Templeton says he’d be proud to marry Elly, the Clampetts begin to plan and rehearse Elly's wedding. Meanwhile, Drysdale tries to stop this wedding from happening, or at least from losing his largest account. He goes to Silver Dollar City and decides to buy the Bank of Bugtussle so he can still handle his favorite account.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Shorty and Gloria get married, everyone but the two of them want the marriage annulled. Gloria decides she’d like to experience what her new life will be like, and Jed tells her that he’ll show her. When he calls the mansion to tell them to put up the cabin, Granny thinks he got married as well. But when both “couples” come home, Granny, Jethro, and Elly learn that Shorty got married, but Elverna didn’t, and Gloria got married, but Jed didn’t, making Jethro and Granny believe both couples are in a Hollywood marriage.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A radio bulletin states that the minister who married the Howell's was a fraud.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The Professor tries to cure the Skipper's amnesia by hypnotizing him and taking him through time.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint schemes to make money by pretending to be married to a girl from Portugal in need of a green card—until Mama catches wind of the plan.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After attending a big wedding, Bubba, Iola and Mama each fantasize what it would be like to be married.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.sub-title: Father Of The Bride / Best Man / Members Of The Wedding
programme.desc: A wedding at sea ... the bride's father warns the best man to stay away from his other daughter; the groom's grandfather is picked up from a small boat at sea; and Ace moons over the one that got away: the bride.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney visit the Darlings to rid them of Ernest T. Bass, who has his mind set on marrying daughter Charlene.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Mike Lefevre was five years old when his father brought his little sister home from the hospital, holding her in one hand and a plush Snoopy in the other. For Mike, it was love at first sight , for both his sibling and her stuffed toy. And from that moment on, America’s favorite anthropomorphic beagle became a fixture in Mike's life. By the time he was ten, he had acquired more than a dozen Snoopy collectibles. Today, his collection contains more than 15,000 Snoopy items. And they are on full display for all to see in a museum he has built at his waterfront restaurant in suburban Detroit. Our pop culture toy expert, Johnpaul Ragusa, has his own connection to the Peanuts character. His wife is an avid fan, and his home is filled with Snoopy paraphernalia."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and Trapper prevent a GI from marrying a call girl who has TB, while trying to help a Korean soldier join his pregnant wife. Radar, of course, provides his usual invaluable help.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Prompted by pressure from Frank, Hot Lips sets a date for marriage with Lieutenant Colonel Donald Penobscott. When Donald arrives in camp for the wedding, a bridal shower and bachelor party are given. When he has passed out drunk, Hawkeye and B.J. place Donald in a body cast and convince him that he has broken his leg.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith's cousin, Maude, invites Archie and Edith to the wedding of her daughter, Carol. However, Carol and Maude are not looking forward to Archie, since the man she is marrying happens to be Jewish. Later, the men and the women have their respective bachelor and bachelorette parties, but a grumpy Archie decides to stay in the motel. Meanwhile, Carol realizes just what her fiancée envisions as married life.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is in a celebratory mood for Mike and Gloria's second wedding anniversary. While sitting around the dinner table enjoying a special cake, the family recalls Mike and Gloria's wedding. They also recall how Mike's Uncle Casimir met Archie and how they butted heads over who would perform the ceremony.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The family continues to reminisce on Mike and Gloria's second wedding anniversary and they recall the actual day Mike and Gloria got married. As Archie and Mike's Uncle Casimir continue to butt heads, Edith must gather up strength to tell Gloria about 'the birds and the bees'.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith, Mike and Gloria are each extended a special invitation to attend Lionel's engagement party. However, Archie isn't invited, that is until a big argument between Louise and George results in Louise deciding to invite him. Later, during the party, George is in for a big shock when it turns out that Lionel's fiancée, Jennie has interracial parents.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Nanette Fabray And Michele Lee (s1, ep)
programme.desc: "Guests Nanette Fabray and Michele Lee. Originally aired on 04/13/70."

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In After the Wedding, Carol's husband becomes jealous when she kisses another man goodbye. Then, in Energy Crisis Blackouts, everyone's life is complicated when the electricity stops. Finally, in Wedding Plans, divorcees discuss their future wedding plans, only to discover they may still love their old spouse.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recounts his hectic wedding days.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Sally dates a comedian who never paid Rob and Buddy for writing his material.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph's advice to a lodge brother on how to be head of the household has his wife (Alice's sister) in tears.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A U.S. naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound that appears to be coming from a sunken submarine.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man desperate for money takes on a strange job offer.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Anna Kerkoska plans to defect with a list of American agents given to her by her father, the late premier. Her brother, Alexi, also plans to defect, but it's actually a plan to grab the list, turn it over to Police Chief Petrovitch and sell out his sister.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble unwittingly hitches a ride with Hanes McClure, a wanted criminal out to settle a score in his Georgia hometown. When Hanes attempts to crash a barricade, Kimble grabs the wheel to save an innocent life, but it gets both of them arrested. Both Kimbl

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Harry Orwell fights to clear his friend Lt. Trench when the police detective is framed for the murder of a narcotics informant."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The problems of policemen's wives.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police go after a college student who has turned to murder.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed and Malloy have to think outside the box to capture an intelligent yet neglected teenage purse snatcher. Their efforts to talk sense into him before he commits a much more serious crime prove to be futile.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed and Malloy report to a burglary call that was witnessed by a boy with a photographic memory. Afterward, they are called to the scene of two drunk men shooting at a box of dynamite at close range in a residential area.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony put their athletic skills to the test with the help of a special network guest."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "Wally and his friends are trying to earn enough money to buy baseball uniforms so they put a plan into action by doing their chores at a slow pace in order to maximize their hourly pay. Meanwhile, Beaver, also wanting to be on the team, begins selling water to his family and neighbors."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver has a crush on his teacher, Miss Canfield. When Judy, Whitey and Larry tease him for being a "teacher's pet," Beaver tries to prove them wrong and places a spring snake in her desk. However, Beaver has second thoughts and becomes determined to remove the snake before she finds it.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Murderous Mermaid
programme.desc: After a swimming stunt goes horribly wrong, a young woman is charged with orchestrating the mayhem, and Mason must set the record straight.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock is hired by a friend to defend his enlisted son. The boy's been charged with killing a sadistic lieutenant whose mistreatment led to the death of another soldier.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An ex-convict attempts to retrieve his loot from his wife and her new husband in this tongue-in-cheek episode.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Mary Ellen and Erin both fall for a forestry student

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Burke Reese and his son want Pezzy Nellar & his wife Cora to sell their farm but they don’t want to sell. Matt asks Pezzy to swear out a complaint against Reese and his son when Pezzy’s chicken coop gets burned but he says he can’t swear it was Reese."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Kate wants her husband Jeff Kinsman to kill Ed Dolliver because she says Dolliver insulted her. When Jeff winds up dead Kate accuses Dolliver. Kate gets mad when Matt doesn’t arrest Dolliver and tells him she’ll make trouble if Matt doesn’t do something about it. Matt comes up with a plan to find out who really killed Jeff."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and Little Joe vie for the attention of visiting entertainer Mademoiselle Denise, but she has no time for them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A snake crawls into Lucas' bed, and Mark must lure it away before it strikes.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Getting set to leave the wagon train, Vivian Carter finds out that a friend from the train is heading off to a new life and marriage.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A boat has an explosion en route to the marina. John obsesses about the lack of night runs and can't sleep. A man and his son are injured when they swerve to avoid a dog. Doctors race against time to save a marijuana smoker dying of an unidentifiable malady. A worker is pinned in a loading dock by a semi. A man and child fall into a gravel pit.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A wounded colonel's gun, a showpiece, disappears, and Hawkeye and B.J. play a hunch and bluff Frank, who has it, into returning it.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Mail brings a letter to Frank saying his wife is divorcing him, and one to Potter telling him he's going to be a grandfather.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar gets the help of Hawkeye and B.J. to procure something Colonel Potter says he's fond of, but that's hard to come by—tomato juice.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar writes home to his mother, as Hawkeye conducts the camp foot inspection, and Colonel Potter gets some shrapnel in his backside.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie doesn't like his new teacher, "Old Lady Crump," because she gives too much homework. Andy comments on the teacher, words which Opie twists in his retelling to Ms. Crump, and she is furious.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, saddened by the death of a friend, is feeling old and tired. She stumbles across a medicine man's presentation and is intrigued by his bottle of elixir, which she believes to add pep to her life.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny believes that Mrs. Drysdale has turned herself into a bird after she said a few zodiacal words, which Granny believes is black magic. Granny does what she can to change her back to normal.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph and Norton don't want to take their wives on a Raccoon fishing trip.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After detecting an information leak in the area of Stalag 13, the Germans replace Klink with a more efficient officer, who Hogan sets up to take the fall.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to keep a French painting from ending up in Goering's art collection.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: And When The Sky Was Opened
programme.desc: When three U.S. astronauts return to Earth after the first flight into space, they begin being erased from history one by one.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Tarnished Trademark
programme.desc: Axel Norstaad sells his much respected furniture trademark to Martin Somers, described by some as the slide trombone of the furniture business. Somers immediately begins stripping the company of its assets and churning out inferior products.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot while making a routine check on a pair of paroled convicts parked near a liquor store.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man finds his disappeared wife in a painting.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Lawrence Appleby will do anything to keep his antiques shop, even murder.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix investigates when a plane crash is followed by murder attempts on the survivors.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A doctor who is conducting a medical research project at the state prison is the victim of harassment.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A pilot's body, slashed by a propeller, is found on an airship.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon recruit a woman cop to nab a burglar.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate cases in a hospital emergency ward.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.sub-title: Log 65 -- Cigarettes, Cars And Wild, Wild Women
programme.desc: Reed and Malloy help take down a chop-shop that employs cute girls in mini-skirts to steal cars from trusting men. They also arrest a young man who grows pot and holds parties in the home of his unsuspecting shut-in aunt.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After responding to a gas leak in a home, reed and malloy search for a missing child. Finally, they investigate an attempted car theft that ended with a fatal shooting.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony explore Massachusetts!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and his friends build a clubhouse, and Beaver wants to join. Although the dues are $1 for 8th graders, Beaver has to come up with $3 in order to join their club. How can Beaver earn the money?

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Beaver dread attending dance school, so when Wally suddenly takes a liking in it, June and Ward are dumbfounded. It seems Wally has developed a crush on a girl named Penny and Beaver soon feels neglected and left out when Wally begins spending all his time with her.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Careless Kitten
programme.desc: When a woman receives a phone call from a man claiming to be her wealthy uncle who disappeared 10 years prior, Mason is called in to investigate. A proposed encounter with the man leads to the discovery of a corpse and soon the niece of the phantom uncle is poisoned.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: As the murder case involving the death of a sadistic Army lieutenant progresses, Matlock discovers that the lieutenant and four other officers may have been involved in smuggling drugs.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A political prisoner who entered the country illegally, seeks sanctuary in a monastery. Gillespie and Tibbs find themselves at odds with Sheriff McComb when they try to help the man.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Marsha, John-Boy's old girlfriend, returns to sell her family home at the urging of her fiance

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "When a crazy man and his two sons whip a cowboy with a bullwhip almost killing the cowboy, Matt rescues the cowboy from the severe whipping. When Matt asks Chester to untie the cowboy, the man makes threats to punish Chester for his sinful ways. As Chester is walking home from the Long Branch, the man and his two sons kidnap Chester."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Matt and Chester find a young Indian woman (Sochi) on the prairie suffering from a gunshot wound. Matt and Chester take the young woman to Doc Adams for medical treatment, but the overall outlook for recovery does not look promising Once Matt hears that a white man shot the woman, Matt and Chester set after the man."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe tries to drive an old woman away from a destructive strip miner, which she mistakes as an attempt to grab up her land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering an old enemy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Suspecting a hurt girl he finds on the trail is part of a group of bandits, Flint cautiously helps her. He soon learns that she is all he suspects, but when her guardian is killed Flint becomes her only protection.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A child is trapped in a car under downed power lines. A stockbroker with heart problems is reluctant to be treated. An elderly woman that Roy and John treated the previous year dies and remembers them in her will. Dr. Early administers first aid to two young boys. A teenager loses a hamburger eating contest. The Paramedics treat a burn victim at an explosive fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter decides Frank would be less of a pain if the others were friendlier to him; they oblige, with some startling results.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is injured in a jeep accident and, aware he has a concussion, babbles to a Korean family to keep himself awake.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank tries to distinguish himself by selling the camp garbage, but it's Hawkeye who finds a use for it: he dumps it on a troublesome Colonel Coner.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank has Hawkeye up on charges of mutiny for usurping his authority when Potter was away on leave and Frank was the commanding officer. B.J., Potter and Radar are in attendance of the preliminary hearing, at which they hear conflicting versions of what happened.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayberry is visited by an unusual family from the mountains.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A tourist from England has to do chores to pay off a fine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After entering an oil deal with Jed and O.K. Oil, the Sheik befriends the Clampetts, giving Jed four of his dancing girls for wives and tries to get the beautiful Elly May as one of his wives. Jed tries to give the girls back, while Jethro tries to enjoy some of the Sheik's life, mainly the company of his beautiful dancing girls, after selling his cousin.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph has an accident on his way to receiving his Safest Bus Driver Award.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan captures a German general to trade for an American general who dislikes Hogan.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan robs a bank to help pay for a map to German rocket installations.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Glamorous Ghost
programme.desc: Eleanor Corbin pleads amnesia after police find her running and screaming through woods near her apartment building. Her loss of memory is of little help to her when she is later charged with murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon use newspapers, radio and TV to publicize their clues to the identity of a hit-and-run driver.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Karen has a problem with alcohol, one that leaves her wondering what happened the previous night.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Howard Latimer accepts a peculiar bet: to spend the night at a supposedly haunted manor.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Winifred, private secretary and lover of the publisher George Diamond, becomes a runaway witness when a woman falls into the sea and drowns after a quarrel.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon discovers that a man is posing as the son of a wine maker is likely the suspect of the three death attempts already tried against his "father."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Treasure hunters falsify the facts of a diver's death to prevent anyone from meddling in their quest.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police zero in on a rat: a forger, bigamist and thief who even robs from the blind.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday investigates the junior high drug scene.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: "The officers investigate robberies, attempted arson and a violent argument."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Officer Malloy pays tribute to Officer Tom Porter, who has recently fallen in the line of duty. Malloy recounts the close friendship they developed while training at the academy, as well as the moments where they crossed paths on duty, including the night of the officer's unfortunate demise.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill rolls the pop-culture clock back 30 years to the era when... he had a Rachael cut?? "

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: When June goes on a trip to visit her sister, Peggy, June's Aunt Martha steps in and stays with Ward and the boys. They do their best not to hurt Martha's feelings, but Beaver has the hardest time, when she buys him a suit, knee socks, a cap and short pants and makes him wear the outfit to school.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Beaver want to win a fancy film projector and in order to get it they have to sell 24 bottles of perfume. However, the appalling aroma of the perfume quickly leads to zero sales and has Ward trying to think up a sales gimmick.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Deadly Debt
programme.desc: A man suspects his father was killed by a gangster to whom he owed $10,000. When the gangster turns up dead, the timing couldn't be worse for the bereaving son.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock is hired to defend a popular actor accused of killing the owner of a sex-therapy clinic at which he was staying. Meanwhile, the lawyer also finds himself hounded by a law student looking for a job.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie, Tibbs and Father DiMarco must stand trial for harboring a fugitive and obstructing justice. Althea fears Virgil's career could suffer if he is found guilty. Meanwhile the other officers monitor the situation with Lawyer Epp and his mafia associates.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Cousin Olivia, who married on the mountain in The Shivaree episode, returns to Walton's Mountain following her husband's sudden death

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Sted Rutgers comes back to Dodge after 3 years to find that his brother Tom married his girl Tassy. Now Sted wants to kill Tom."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Drunken ex-gunfighter Zeno promises 12 yr old orphan Tommy boots for his birthday. Gunfighter Hank Fergus who made Zeno lose his nerve comes back to Dodge to get Zeno to rob the General Store for him."

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is in line for a hanging when he is accused of murdering a wealthy man. But the town is more concerned over finding the location of the man's fortune than Hoss' punishment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark is paralyzed, Lucas attempts to cure him at the mission.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: New arrival Mario Arsatti becomes very friendly with Lucas, but this turns out to be merely pleasure before business: he's been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Leaving the safety of their village, a group of nuns sets out to help indians at a mission. Now Flint must help them fight off some Ute indians who don't take kindly to the nuns' presence.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A woman screams for therapeutic reasons. When the paramedics are interviewed on a TV program, Johnny freezes in front of the camera and Roy must bail him out. A young boy attempts suicide by leaping off an apartment ledge at the hospital; the doctors suspect he may be an abused child. The paramedics rescue a man trapped in a doughnut machine and a child from a fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th turns up a sick helicopter pilot, 'Smilin' Jack, who doesn't want to quit, and a twice-wounded GI who does.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is reunited with a woman he thought was out of his life forever, but who never altogether leaves.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A sudden deluge of wounded at the 4077th is followed by a fire and a rainstorm, which makes matters difficult for the staff.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Clete Roberts has arrived in Korea to interview the staff of the 4077th Mobile Army Surgical Hospital because of its high 97% efficiency rating. In Roberts' interviews with Hawkeye, B.J., Frank, Radar, Klinger, Mulcahy and Potter, they talk about how they cope with their situation, what they miss about home, how they feel about who they work with and whether they see any good in coming from war.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie has his first crush, who ignores him. Barney steps in and tries to give him advice about women, which leads to Opie developing a crush on Thelma Lou.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Visiting officials take pause when they visit Mayberry and find that the courthouse is full of dogs.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro continues his fantasy of being a double naught spy by getting an office at the bank. When two bank robbers arrive, who are interested in that office because it is above the vault, they make Jethro believe they are from London headquarters.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: When the Kramdens and Nortons enter a Raccoon costume contest a feud arises between Ralph and Ed.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Praise The Fuhrer And Pass The Ammunition
programme.desc: Hogan and his men create chaos during staged war games that a ruthless Nazi colonel has scheduled near Stalag 13, replacing the exercise's fake explosives with live ammunition.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan resents having a lady scientist in charge of a mission to destroy a lab.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Four Of Us Are Dying
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Poison Pen-pal
programme.desc: A casual pen pal relationship leads to insider information and murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday goes undercover with the department's chaplain in order to bust a gambling ring.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Lottie Slocum is excited to be the center of attention after the woman she babysits for is murdered.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A jealous man kills the fiancé of his unrequited love.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix searches for Australian sailor Paul Gantry, who is supposedly due to inherit a million dollars.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: An ex-con is threatened when his safe cracking skills are needed for a theft of 1 million dollars.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A man returns from prison and learns that his partner in a ten-year-old kidnapping never gave back the abducted child.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A murder victim's smoking habits help Friday track down the killer.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A high school student is missing.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and reed hunt down a suspect who has been bombing downtown storefronts. Then they report to a scuffle between two native americans at a bar that the bartender thinks may be a prelude to something a lot more serious.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: In what would prove to be a very busy shift, Malloy and Reed search for a serial arsonist who spawns a copycat, settle a domestic dispute that results from a love triangle, rescue a man who wandered onto the ledge of a high rise and deal with a mentally ill man who is holding his wife at knife-point.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony explore ancient ruins and lost cities."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June and Ward make Wally and Beaver promise that they won't go see a scary movie. However, Wally and Beaver are talked into seeing it, thanks to Wally's so-called best friend, Eddie Haskell. The movie has quite an influence on Beaver, who makes a voodoo doll, names it Eddie Haskell and sticks it with pins.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After taking an IQ test, Beaver scores the highest in his class and Mrs. Rayburn suggests that it would be best if Beaver went to a special school, where his abilities can be challenged. However, little does anyone know, everything is not as it seems.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Gambling Lady
programme.desc: Counterfeit casino chips and chronic gambling lead to murder, and Mason suspects one of his clients may be culpable.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: While defending a union boss (Dan Keaton) accused of murdering a rival, a juror (Harry Craven) comes forward with a bombshell: he claims Matlock paid him off to vote a certain way.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Big city crack dealers invade Sparta. Eugene witnesses the drive by shooting of a friend and his offer to help the police identify the shooters leaves Harriet frightened and angry at Bill.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: King Edward VIII abdicates the throne and the Waltons follow the story

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Cyrus Tucker tells the Marshall his wife has disappeared. When Hody Peel shows up in town selling used women's clothes it looks like he had something to do with her disappearance."

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: "Two drunken cowboys assault Chavela (Miguel's Daughter). When they come to talk to her later, they hit her father and while running away Chavela falls and hits her head. Miguel says the law has to be by a man's own hands. Matt says that he is the law not Miguel. "

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Candy gets a blast from the past when he runs into old friends from his days in the Army. Add gunfights, old flames, true love and the Cartwrights to the mix, and it spins an exciting tale!

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.sub-title: Old Man Running (aka The Wanted Man)
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notoriously lazy Jackman brothers discover their mortgage has been foreclosed.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Matthew Lowry seems timid to everyone, especially a bully on the wagon train. Riding upon some cholera-sick wagons in a pass, they find out who he really is and why he has been acting this way.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Responding to a vehicle fire, the firemen discover a catatonic mechanic; at Rampart the doctors are mystified by his condition. Roy lectures a woman who keeps calling the paramedics because she is lonely. A woman mixes ammonia with bleach and inhales poisonous gas. An elderly couple is trapped in their house by a bunch of tumbleweeds.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: Out Of Sight, Out Of Mind
programme.desc: While fixing a stove that explodes, Hawkeye's face is badly burned. His eyes are bandaged, and it is not known if he will ever see again. Meanwhile Frank bets on the outcome of a baseball game, which he has already heard on the radio.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Following an offer of promotion made by Master Sergeant Woodruff at a poker game, Radar is promoted to the rank of lieutenant. Finding this position awkward, Radar opts to return to his position as an enlisted man.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Sidney Freedman, feeling depressed, visits the 4077th to observe how they fare under the pressures of war. He begins a letter to Sigmund Freud as a form of self-therapy, and releases his tension in the form of a practical joke with B.J., aimed at Frank Burns.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After Frank discovers that Danny Fitzsimmons has shot himself to get out of combat, Father Mulcahy is called in. Realizing his lack of understanding of the fighting, Mulcahy accompanies Radar to an aid station, where they encounter the real war at first hand. Mulcahy performs an emergency tracheotomy, guided by Hawkeye over the radio.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Opie and his friend, Arnold, hit a baseball into the window of an old, abandoned house, they hear noises and run for help. Barney and Gomer go to investigate—and hear noises, too!

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A visiting preacher gives a sermon about taking time to relax. In trying to create an atmosphere of relaxation on a Sunday afternoon, the townsfolk all end up running themselves ragged.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale tries to keep the Clampetts in Beverly Hills by telling them there is going to be a Possum Day held there. Granny decides to run for Possum Queen in Beverly Hills, and Drysdale convinces her that she is running against Mrs. Drysdale. Meanwhile, Drysdale is desperate to actually get a Possum Day to happen for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph cuts a record to sweet talk Alice after insulting her mother.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk gets drafted into the German army while working on Hogan's plan to sabotage a ammunition factory.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is hiding a defecting German officer, and convinces Klink that the latter, who looks like Schultz, is really Hitler in disguise.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Mystified Miner
programme.desc: Mason tries to clear his young, beautiful client after a twisting and wheeling plot of murder, kidnapping and embezzlement unfolds.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday learns about a scam artist with a novel twist: he uses an authentic Congressional Medal of Honor to solicit magazine subscriptions.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Dana needs to find the license plate number of the car that killed his fiancée.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A prince sets his eye on Irene and her money.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix struggles to recall events that led to him being shot with his own gun.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: The parents of a teen girl hire Cannon when they discover a charismatic young man is trying to lure their daughter into a cult.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby and J.R. help a cowgirl look for a missing broncobuster, unaware that he's already been murdered.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The policeman's role in court is highlighted in this episode.
